product_overview: PackIQ is a SaaS platform that uses AI to recommend cost-efficient packaging by analyzing product dimensions and current box usage. Users upload product data, run optimizations, and review results and analytics to reduce material and shipping costs.
core_goals: Enable users to upload product dimension data and receive AI-driven packaging recommendations
Provide an easy-to-use product catalog and CRUD management for product data
Display optimization results and analytics so users can measure cost and material savings
Allow users to manage company settings, orders, and subscription/billing information

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public marketing page that introduces PackIQ, highlights features and pricing, and provides entry points to sign up or log in.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See hero section with animated 3D box
Navigate to / -> Scroll through feature sections -> View pricing tiers
Navigate to / -> See Get Started CTA -> Navigate to /auth/signup
Navigate to / -> See Login link -> Navigate to /auth/login

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate existing users via email and password and redirect them to onboarding or the dashboard based on their account state.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit credentials -> Be redirected to /dashboard or /onboarding/company depending on onboarding status
Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill in email -> Fill in incorrect password -> Submit credentials -> See inline error message about invalid credentials

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Create a new user account with email and password and begin the onboarding process.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/signup -> Fill in email -> Fill in password that meets requirements -> Submit registration -> Be redirected to /onboarding/company
Navigate to /auth/signup -> Fill in invalid email or weak password -> Submit registration -> See validation errors for email or password

features.name: Onboarding Flow
features.description: Three-step wizard to collect company profile, industry domain, and team size before granting full dashboard access.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding/company -> Fill in company name -> Fill in company description -> Advance to domain step
Navigate to /onboarding/domain -> Select industry or domain -> Advance to employees step
Navigate to /onboarding/employees -> Select employee count range -> Complete setup -> Be redirected to /dashboard

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Summary view presenting key metrics, recent optimization history, and navigation to other product areas.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See total products count card
Navigate to /dashboard -> See cost savings metrics card -> See optimization runs count
Navigate to /dashboard -> See recent optimization results table -> Use sidebar to navigate to /dashboard/products

features.name: CSV Upload & AI Optimization
features.description: Upload a CSV of product dimensions, preview the parsed data, run AI optimization, and review immediate success/failure counts.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/upload -> Upload a CSV file with required columns -> Preview uploaded data in table

Navigate to /dashboard/upload -> Upload a valid CSV -> Run optimization -> See progress indicator during processing -> See success count and failed items -> Navigate to /dashboard/results to view detailed results
Navigate to /dashboard/upload -> Upload a file missing required CSV columns -> Attempt to preview -> See validation error about CSV format

features.name: Products Management
features.description: View, create, and delete individual product records stored in the application.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/products -> See list of all products in a table
Navigate to /dashboard/products -> Open add product form -> Fill in name, SKU, dimensions, weight -> Save product -> See new product in table
Navigate to /dashboard/products -> Select a product to delete -> Confirm deletion -> See product removed from the table

features.name: Optimization Results Viewer
features.description: Explore AI-generated optimization recommendations, view AI reasoning, and export results.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/results -> View results table with original and optimized box dimensions
Navigate to /dashboard/results -> Expand AI reasoning for a result -> Read AI explanation for the recommendation
Navigate to /dashboard/results -> Apply a date or savings filter -> Download CSV of filtered results

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Visualize optimization performance over time with charts and filters to measure impact.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/analytics -> View total savings bar chart by month
Navigate to /dashboard/analytics -> View optimization count trend line chart
Navigate to /dashboard/analytics -> Select a date range filter -> See charts update to reflect selected range

features.name: Orders Management
features.description: Track and manage packaging orders including creation and status filtering.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/orders -> View list of orders with status badges
Navigate to /dashboard/orders -> Filter orders by status (pending, shipped, delivered) -> See filtered list
Navigate to /dashboard/orders -> Open order details for a row -> Create a new order by providing required fields -> See new order appear in the list

features.name: Box Catalog
features.description: Browse available box sizes and specifications and add catalog boxes to products.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/catalog -> View grid of available box sizes
Navigate to /dashboard/catalog -> Filter by dimension range -> See filtered box list
Navigate to /dashboard/catalog -> View box price and volume details -> Add a box to a product

features.name: Shipment Tracking
features.description: Lookup a shipment by tracking number and view its timeline and estimated delivery.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/tracking -> Enter tracking number -> Trigger tracking lookup -> View shipment timeline and status steps
Navigate to /dashboard/tracking -> Enter tracking number -> Trigger tracking lookup -> View estimated delivery date

features.name: Settings
features.description: View and update company and account settings, including notification preferences.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> View current company name and description
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Update company name or description -> Toggle notification preferences -> Save changes -> See confirmation of saved settings

features.name: Subscription & Billing
features.description: View subscription status and billing history and initiate plan changes via Stripe Checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/subscription -> View current subscription plan and status
Navigate to /dashboard/subscription -> Initiate an upgrade -> Be redirected to Stripe Checkout
Navigate to /dashboard/subscription -> View billing history table -> Inspect invoice date and amount

routes.description: Landing page with 3D box animation and CTA
User login with email/password and Google OAuth
Step 1 of onboarding - company profile setup
Step 3 of onboarding - team size configuration
CSV upload for bulk product data
Subscription and billing management via Stripe

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public marketing page with 3D box animation, feature highlights, pricing section, and sign-up CTA
user_interactions: View hero section with 3D box animation
Click Get Started button to navigate to signup
Click Login button to navigate to login page
View pricing tiers
Scroll through feature sections

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login page supporting email/password and Google OAuth sign-in
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click Sign In button to submit credentials
Click Continue with Google for OAuth login
See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to signup page via link

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Registration page for new users with email/password
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click Create Account button
See validation errors for weak password or existing email
Navigate back to login

features.name: Onboarding Flow
features.description: 3-step onboarding wizard for new authenticated users to set up their company profile
user_interactions: Fill company name field
Fill company description
Click Next to advance to domain step
Select industry/domain from dropdown
Select employee count range
Click Complete Setup to finish onboarding

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Main dashboard displaying key metrics, recent optimization history, and navigation sidebar
user_interactions: View total products count card
View cost savings metrics card
View optimization runs count
Click sidebar navigation items to switch sections
View recent optimization results table

features.name: CSV Upload & AI Optimization
features.description: Upload CSV file with product dimensions, trigger AI optimization via OpenRouter, view results
user_interactions: Click to upload CSV file or drag and drop
Preview uploaded data in table
Click Run Optimization button to trigger AI analysis
View progress indicator during processing
See success count and failed items after completion

features.name: Products Management
features.description: CRUD interface for managing individual product records
user_interactions: View list of all products in a table
Click Add Product button to open form modal
Fill product name, SKU, dimensions, weight fields
Click Save to create product
Click Delete icon to remove a product
See confirmation before deletion

features.name: Optimization Results
features.description: View and download AI-generated packaging optimization results
user_interactions: View results table with original vs optimized box dimensions
View cost savings per product
View AI reasoning for each recommendation
Click Download CSV to export results
Filter results by date or savings threshold

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Charts and data visualizations for optimization performance over time
user_interactions: View total savings bar chart by month
View optimization count trend line chart
View box size distribution pie chart
Select date range filter

features.name: Orders Management
features.description: Track and manage packaging orders
user_interactions: View list of orders with status badges
Filter orders by status (pending/shipped/delivered)
Click order row to view details
Create new order

features.name: Box Catalog
features.description: Browse available box sizes and specifications from the catalog
user_interactions: View grid of available box sizes
Filter by dimension range
View box price and volume details
Add box to products list

features.name: Shipment Tracking
features.description: Track shipments with real-time status updates
user_interactions: Enter tracking number in search field
Click Track button to get status
View shipment timeline/status steps
View estimated delivery date

features.name: Settings
features.description: Account, company, and notification settings management
user_interactions: View and edit company name and description
Update notification preferences toggles
Click Save Changes button
View API key section

features.name: Subscription & Billing
features.description: Manage Stripe subscription plan, view invoices, upgrade/downgrade plan
user_interactions: View current subscription plan and status
Click Upgrade button to initiate Stripe Checkout
View billing history table
Click Cancel Subscription button

known_limitations.issue: AI optimization requires valid OPENROUTER_API_KEY environment variable; will fail with 401 in test environments
known_limitations.impact: Optimization endpoint returns error without valid API key

known_limitations.issue: Google OAuth requires valid Supabase project URL and anon key; redirects will fail without environment variables
known_limitations.impact: Google OAuth button click results in error

known_limitations.issue: Stripe checkout requires valid STRIPE_SECRET_KEY; checkout session creation will fail without it
known_limitations.impact: Subscription upgrade flow cannot complete without valid Stripe credentials

known_limitations.issue: Middleware always redirects unauthenticated users away from /dashboard and /onboarding to /auth/login
known_limitations.impact: Dashboard pages cannot be directly accessed without a valid session
